mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (post_type, post_status, category_id, user_id, title, content, view_count, like_count, comment_count, pinned, create_time, update_time, deleted_at) VALUES (#{postType}, #{postStatus}, #{categoryId}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{commentCount}, #{pinned}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deletedAt})
mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.title, p.like_count AS likes, p.comment_count AS comments, p.view_count AS views, p.create_time,
u.username,
avatar_res.file_url AS avatar,
cover_res.file_url AS cover
FROM posts p INNER JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN resource_file avatar_res ON avatar_res.biz_type = 'AVATAR' AND avatar_res.biz_id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN resource_file cover_res ON cover_res.biz_type = 'POST_COVER' AND cover_res.biz_id = p.id
WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY p.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
